aboutBody: {{brand}} delivers professional landing pages for local businesses — a clean digital restart, not patching an old CMS.

pathA.title: Landing Page · digital restart
pathA.subtitle: A modern, fast page for your business: mobile-first, clear path to booking or a call. Not WordPress patchwork — a clean restart — often in about 15 minutes.
pathA.diffBasic1: Modern landing page — mobile, clear path to call or inquiry
pathA.diffBasic2: Full website archive (ZIP) — you own the files
pathA.diffBusiness1: Everything in Basic — plus design for customer acquisition
pathA.diffBusiness2: Google Maps, FAQ, trust bar, extended SEO
pathA.diffPremium1: Everything in Business — exclusive Premium design
pathA.diffPremium2: Assisted go-live with your access + 14 days support
pathA.what1: Finished landing page — mobile, clear path to call or inquiry
pathA.what2: Full website archive (ZIP) — you own the files
pathA.what4: By package: upload help or full publication (you pay domain/hosting)
pathA.what5: Optional: analysis of your current site for the restart
pathA.whatLogo: Your existing logo and brand colors are integrated into the site
pathA.whatDomain: We help you choose a suitable hosting provider. Popular options in Germany include Hetzner, IONOS, All-Inkl and Netcup. Domain and hosting contracts are between you and the provider
pathA.whatLegal: Impressum and privacy templates from your details — go-live only after your review
pathA.process3: We deliver the landing often in about 15 minutes
pathA.faq1q: Do you fix our old website?
pathA.faq1a: No. We deliver a new modern landing restart — no dependency on your old CMS.
pathA.faq2a: Basic €350 · Business €650 · Premium €1,200 — one-time. Domain and hosting stay your ongoing costs.
pathA.faq3a: Order, payment, ZIP and publish questions: email {{email}} — we reply in German for DE. The chat on this page is for trying the assistant, not order helpdesk.
pathA.faq4q: Is hosting included in the price?
pathA.faq4a: No. We help you choose; common options in Germany include Hetzner, IONOS, All-Inkl and Netcup. Contract and payment are directly with the provider. Business/Premium: we set up the site with your access.
pathA.faq5q: Is Vector support for my order?
pathA.faq5a: No. Vector on /site is for getting to know the product. Anything about active orders (status, download, revisions, hosting access) — please {{email}}.
pathA.afterPay: After payment, production starts. Track status and download your files on the order page.

order.title: Landing Page · digital restart
order.subtitle: A new fast landing page often in about 15 minutes (HTML, mobile, clear booking path). Not WordPress patchwork — an honest restart.
order.subtitleLaunch: Your site is prepared with Vector — finish launch and publish
order.bulletAfterPay: After payment — we produce your landing and deliver the files
order.bulletSorglos: Optional: upload to your domain (hands-off) — domain/hosting paid by customer
order.descriptionPh: Briefly: services, who for, what makes you different
order.companyWebsiteHint: If you have one — we scan it and show only findings we actually detected.
order.domainNeedHelp: I want help choosing and connecting a domain
order.domainHelpNote: We can help pick and connect a domain — without forcing an immediate purchase.
order.materialsHint: PNG, JPG, SVG, WEBP, PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, TXT, ZIP, optional MP4. Unsupported analysis is stored honestly for the project.
order.analysisHint: We review your inputs and pick a matching Visual Experience.
order.analysisEmpty: No public signals — we start from your details.
order.packageHint: Choose a package on the right — preview updates instantly.
order.previewExamplesHint: Examples of the quality level in this package — not the exact website you will receive.
order.previewPlaceholderHint: Previews for this package are being prepared.
order.step1Required: Please fill company name, email and activity
order.domainHostingNote: We help you choose a suitable hosting provider. Popular options in Germany include Hetzner, IONOS, All-Inkl and Netcup. The domain and hosting contract is between you and the provider you choose. Business/Premium: you share access — we upload the site and/or connect domain and SSL.
order.logoNote: Your existing logo and colors are integrated. New logo design is not included unless agreed separately.
order.legalHint: Optional at order time — required to publish in Germany. We fill templates; you review before go-live. Not legal advice.
order.launchFixed: Fixed launch price for the agreed version — no plan shopping or rebuild.
order.payAfter: Payment after confirmation. No hidden fees.
order.agreeSubmit: By clicking “Get a proposal” you agree to the
order.agreeLaunch: By clicking “Launch project” you agree to the
order.emailRequired: Please enter your email — confirmation and payment link go there
order.serverDown: Server unavailable. Please try again later.
order.payUnavailable: Payment temporarily unavailable — we will contact you with an invoice.

status.title: Order status
status.bookmark: Bookmark this page — order status stays up to date here.
status.deployTitle: How do you want to publish?
status.deployAssisted: Assisted Deployment — we help you go live
status.deployZipChosen: ZIP Only selected — download your archive and follow the README.
status.deployAssistedChosen: Assisted Deployment selected — we will follow up. No passwords stored in Virtus.
status.downloadSoon: Download unlocks when the ZIP is ready
status.goliveStep1Hint: Pick a provider and register your domain.
status.goliveStep2Hint: Often domain + hosting with the same provider.
status.goliveStep3Hint: Unzip and upload files via file manager / FTP.
status.interestSaved: Interest saved — we will follow up.

review.title: Your review
review.subtitle: Only after delivery — helps the next clients.
review.textPh: e.g. In six days we had the new website…
review.success: Thanks — your review will be checked before publishing.

order.brandStyleHint: Adds to the niche template — changes colors, type, and radii. Auto = current default.

auto.label: Auto (niche default)
auto.hint: Keep the niche palette — safest default.

order.draftRestored: Uw bestelconcept is hersteld. U kunt verdergaan waar u was gebleven.
order.draftSavedHint: Voortgang wordt automatisch op dit apparaat opgeslagen.
order.livePreviewHint: Updates as you type — no full site build yet.
order.liveAlmostReady: Ready for checkout when you are.
order.checkoutAfterEmail: You receive an email with next steps
order.checkoutConfirmLabel: I have checked the details above.
order.checkoutConfirmHint: Confirm the summary to enable payment.

reviews.title: Client reviews
reviews.empty: Reviews will appear after the first completed orders.

kontakt.title: Contact
kontakt.description: Questions about orders, status or partnership — email us.
kontakt.replyTip: We reply in the language of your market when we can.

servicesIntro: {{brand}}: Landing Page restart (350 / 650 / 1200 €) for local businesses.
